---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for environment, inference, or CI
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the change and expected impact.

## Scope
- [ ] Environment logic (`env.py`)
- [ ] API server (`app.py`)
- [ ] Inference (`inference.py`)
- [ ] Docs/CI/release tooling

## Acceptance Criteria
How we know this is complete.
